data.title: Massachusetts Lawmaker Proposes Special Committee To Investigate Blockchain And Cryptocurrency
data.description: According to Odaily, Massachusetts Representative Kate Lipper-Garabedian has introduced a bill proposing the establishment of a special committee to investigate matters related to blockchain and cryptocurrency. The committee would include members of the state legislature and focus on examining the implications and potential regulations surrounding these technologies.

data.title: Coinbase to List Maple Finance (SYRUP)
data.description: Coinbase will add support for Maple Finance (SYRUP) on the Ethereum (ERC-20 token) network. Trading will begin on or after 9:00 AM PT on March 13, 2025, if liquidity conditions are met. The SYRUP-USD trading pair will be launched in phases once sufficient supply of the asset is available.

data.title: Coinbase: Will suspend FLOKI, Turbo and Gigachad trading for New York users
data.description: According to official news, Coinbase will suspend FLOKI (FLOKI), Turbo (TURBO) and Gigachad (GIGA) trading for New York users at around 2 pm Eastern Time on April 14.

data.title: Massachusetts lawmakers propose setting up special committee on blockchain and cryptocurrency
data.description: Massachusetts Representative Kate Lipper-Garabedian has filed a bill proposing the creation of a special committee including members of the state legislature to investigate matters related to blockchain and cryptocurrency.

data.title: Nebraska signs Bitcoin ATM regulation bill
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nebraska Governor Jim Pillen officially signed the LB609 bill on Wednesday to regulate Bitcoin ATMs and other electronic transaction terminals to prevent fraud and protect consumer rights. The bill requires Bitcoin ATM operators to clearly disclose all terms of use and provide users with eye-catching anti-fraud warnings. In addition, if users report fraud to operators and law enforcement within 90 days, they can get a full refund.

data.title: Top industry exec thinks Bitcoin reaching $150,000 is ‘pretty achievable’
data.description:
Bitcoin could hit $150K or higher by the end of 2025, according to industry experts.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/top-industry-exec-thinks-bitcoin-reaching-150000-is-pretty-achievable-

data.title: House Democrats pile on Trump criticism after ‘quid pro quo’ Tesla endorsement
data.description:
Elon Musk is cashing in his favors big time. Before Donald Trump’s latest stunt in the White House, there was grumbling about how Musk seemed to have him eating out of his hands.  Those grumblings are growing into shouts after the United States president cut a promo for Tesla on the White House lawn. Many […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/house-democrats-pile-on-trump-after-tesla/

data.title: OKX Europe acquires Malta MiFID II licensee
data.description: OKX Europe has announced the acquisition of a Maltese company with a MiFID II license, taking an important step towards providing compliant derivatives trading in Europe. OKX still needs to obtain approval from the Malta Financial Services Authority (MFSA), and the entity is expected to be officially operational later this year. The MiFID II license will enable OKX to provide regulated derivatives services to institutional clients within the European Economic Area (EEA), covering 27 EU member states as well as Iceland, Liechtenstein and Norway.

data.title: Co-founder of Garantex, a Russian-sanctioned crypto exchange, arrested in India
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to TechCrunch, Aleksej Besciokov, co-founder of the sanctioned Russian crypto trading platform Garantex, was arrested while on vacation in India. Besciokov faces charges of money laundering conspiracy, conspiracy to violate sanctions, and operating an unlicensed money transmission business. Last week, a joint action by international law enforcement agencies consisting of the United States, Germany, and Finland seized Garantex's servers and domain names and froze nearly $28 million in crypto assets. The action was assisted by stablecoin issuer Tether.

data.title: Crypto exchange OKX secures MiFID II license in Europe
data.description:
Cryptocurrency exchange OKX has acquired a key European Union license that will enable the company to offer derivatives products throughout the region, potentially opening the door to a more advanced segment of the trading community. In a March 12 announcement, OKX’s Europe CEO, Erald Ghoos, confirmed that the exchange acquired a Markets in Financial Instruments Directive (MiFID II) license....
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/crypto-exchange-okx-mifidii-license-europe?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
